headline: Ralph Lauren price target boosted on stronger brand positioning among luxury peers
summary: Bank of America has raised its price objective on Ralph Lauren Corp (NYSE:RL) to $450 from $400 while reiterating a ‘Buy’ rating, pointing to a longer-duration outlook for margin-accretive growth and additional earnings upside. The analysts now value the stock on a higher earnings multiple,...

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Ralph Lauren, Raises Price Target to $450
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Christopher Nardone   maintains Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $400 to $450.
